content_body: What a week—such a beautiful place! We have been coming to Blue Ridge for about 10 years, and this time we brought our good friends for the first time. They, like us, were amazed at the scenery and the cabins, but most of all, the genuinely kind locals. In all the years coming down here, this is the first time staying this far from town. We found it to be wonderfully peaceful. Also, Bella Vista Lodge is by far the nicest of any cabins we have rented. We would definitely like to come before the year end. We can't thank you enough.
title: Such  a Beautiful Place!
